item.title: 0.1 beta 3
item.description:
Habitat Version 0.1 Beta 3

What's New & Improved

  • Working on: A new tool. Code named: Biscuit
  • Working on: Multi-Lingual Support…this might take a while though.
  • Improved: Echo menubar popup lagging while scrolling.
  • Improved: Echo menubar icon size and margins.
  • Added: An easter egg…can you find it?
  • Added: Option to disable mouse settings as a whole. [Squeak]
  • Added: Multi-finger controls with 3 or 4 fingers for more trackpad control. [Squeak]
  • Added: Interactive introduction screen for new users.
  • Fixed: Random downloads folder permission showing on first launch.

More to come.
— Thank you for all the support feedback!
